articles.title: Gavaskar, Swann laud Manav Suthar; call him 'strong Test contender'
articles.description: Former cricketers Sunil Gavaskar and Graeme Swann praised young all-rounder Manav Suthar for his impressive Test debut against Afghanistan. Gavaskar called him a 'strong contender at Test level' while Swann lauded his control and adaptability.

articles.title: Sourav Ganguly Reacts To Suryakumar Yadav Removal As T20I Captain, Makes Big Claim
articles.description: Sourav Ganguly has reacted to Suryakumar Yadav's removal as the T20I captain and made a big claim. The selectors removed Suryakumar and appointed Shreyas Iyer as the new captain.

articles.title: Stokes bats for better pitches after England’s four-day win over New Zealand at Lord’s
articles.description: The test at the home of cricket lasted just 166 completed overs — making it the second shortest ever in the 150 to be staged at Lord’s — and with just 617 runs scored by the two teams combined.

articles.title: Manav Suthar gives a trailer of his talent
articles.description: Cricket debut: Manav Suthar shone for India in the one-off Test versus Afghanistan, scoring 28 runs and taking 3/21. With 129 first-class wickets and strong red-ball skills, the young left-arm spinner impressed selectors and teammates alike.

articles.title: "Treat To Watch": Suthar Gets Huge Praise From Teammate After 3 Wickets
articles.description: Debutant left-arm spinner Manav Suthar is blessed with amazing skills-sets and will be a treat to watch in the coming days, reckoned all-rounder Washington Sundar.

articles.title: "Genuine Treat To Watch": Manav Suthar Gets Huge Praise From Teammate After 3 Wickets On Debut

articles.title: Sunil Gavaskar Backs Manav Suthar As Future Test Mainstay: 'The Confidence He Showed...'
articles.description: Sunil Gavaskar hails Manav Suthar and Prasidh Krishna for skill and adaptability, lauds Rahmat Shah's resilient innings in the one-off Test.

articles.title: Pakistan Likely To Have A New Test Captain After Bangladesh Loss. Not Babar Azam
articles.description: Pakistan cricket is all set to see another change in Test captaincy with Salman Agha replacing Shan Masood who has a disappointing stint in the last three years.

articles.title: IND vs AFG Test | It was a genuine treat to watch Manav bowl: Washington
articles.description: Washington Sundar praises debutant Manav Suthar's impressive bowling skills after his standout performance against Afghanistan.

articles.title: Pepe Marti shares behind-the-scenes moments from his maiden Monaco podium: “This is the first of many, many trophies”
articles.description: Cupra Kiro driver Pepe Marti has shared a nine-minute YouTube vlog giving fans a behind-the-scenes look at his first Formula E podium. It shows all that went about in the paddock before and after the Round 9 race in Monaco. Interestingly, the video does not feature teammate Dan Ticktum, who lost his podium finish to Marti after receiving a post-race penalty.

articles.title: Ind vs Afg, 1st Test - Manav Suthar strikes on debut after India declare on 564
articles.description: Mohammad Saleem got a six-for in his second Test and India sent Afghanistan to bat just over 20 minutes before tea

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C Preview: Brazil Lead the Way, But Morocco Lurk
articles.description: Brazil begin their World Cup title hunt in Group C, but Morocco's giant-killing pedigree, Scotland's hopes and Haiti's return promise plenty of drama.

articles.description: Canada’s home World Cup campaign begins against Bosnia and Herzegovina, but Switzerland, Qatar and injury concerns around Alphonso Davies make Group B unpredictable.

articles.description: Mexico open the World Cup on home soil, but South Korea, Czechia and returning South Africa all have ambitions of their own in one of the tournament’s most intriguing groups.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup: Listing all the major firsts for the 2026 edition of the mega event
articles.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off soon and with 48 teams participating in the event, a lot of history is set to be created at the mega event. Check out all the major firsts that will take place at the football World Cup.

articles.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3: All Sprites, abilities, and extraction guide
articles.description: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3's Runners update introduces Sprites, offering unique passive buffs to aid players in matches. These Sprites can be found in chests, dropped by opponents, or discovered on the Shattered Coast map. Players can also extract Sprites to add them to their permanent collection, earning Sprite Dust in the process.

articles.title: PM Hails Indian Women's Football Team On SAFF Championship 2026 Win: 'Will Encourage More Youngsters'
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi hailed India's SAFF Women's Championship victory, saying the team's success will inspire more youngsters to take up football in the future.

articles.title: Gabby Thomas wins 200m title at Lone Star Grand Prix, sets 2026 world best
articles.description: With her effort in College Station, Texas, Thomas broke the former 2026 world best of 21.86 by reigning Olympic 100m champion Julien Alfred of St. Lucia, set on April 30 in Austin, Texas.

articles.title: Shubman Gill's T20I Snub: Not Strike Rate, Report Reveals Actual Reason Behind BCCI's Move
articles.description: While Shubman Gill is not in the T20I scheme of things as of now, he is expected to bounce back into contention before the start of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics or the T20 World Cup in Australia.

articles.title: Ashwin on Suryakumar's T20I snub: A significant precedent set
articles.description: R Ashwin voiced concern over Suryakumar Yadav's T20I omission, calling it a 'landmark' precedent. He questioned dropping a T20 World Cup-winning captain and the appointment of Shreyas Iyer from outside the squad.

articles.title: WI vs SL 2nd ODI abandoned due to rain; hosts' series hopes dashed
articles.description: Persistent rain at Sabina Park forced the abandonment of the second ODI between West Indies and Sri Lanka. West Indies won the toss but no ball was bowled. The washout ends the hosts' series victory hopes, with Sri Lanka maintaining their 1-0 lead.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Iran slams US over ‘discriminatory’ denial of visas to 15 football officials
articles.description: Iran has also demanded FIFA to hold the US accountable for the discriminatory treatment of Iranian administrative officials, and violation of its terms.

articles.title: Germany Beat Combative US In Co-Hosts' Final FIFA World Cup Warmup
articles.description: Kai Havertz and Leroy Sane led Germany to a 2-1 win over the United States in Chicago on Saturday, but an impressive performance in defeat by the World Cup co-hosts will do little to dampen feverish expectations among home fans.

articles.title: Portugal-Chile Friendly Turns Violent; Trouble Brews For Cristiano Ronaldo's FIFA World Cup Plans: Watch
articles.description: Portugal's World Cup preparations suffered a setback after Rafael Leao was sent off during a fiery friendly against Chile. The Portugal star now faces uncertainty as FIFA may consider possible disciplinary action.

articles.description: Shreyas Iyer "honoured" as he replaced Suryakumar Yadav as India's new T20I captain.

articles.title: Max Verstappen reacts after locking Monaco front row with sensational qualifying drive: 'Overall, I am...'
articles.description: Max Verstappen has managed only one podium in the opening five races of the ​season, but a sensational qualifying performance means he will start alongside ​pole setter Kimi Antonelli.

articles.title: “The Homelander himself”: Cristiano Ronaldo’s latest post sparks astonishing reaction from fans ahead of World Cup 2026
articles.description: Portugal secured a 2-1 victory over Chile in a pre-World Cup friendly in Oeiras, with Gonçalo Guedes and Bruno Fernandes providing the goals before Lucas Cepeda pulled one back in stoppage time. Following the match, Cristiano Ronaldo shared a post on X declaring he was "Preparing for the World Cup," which triggered a wave of fan reactions online. Supporters called him "The Homelander," the GOAT, and expressed widespread hope that Portugal can go all the way at the 2026 FIFA World Cup in North America.

articles.title: ABP Majha Top 10, 7 June 2026 : आजच्या ठळक घडामोडी, Breaking News Today, सकाळच्या ब्रेकिंग न्यूज, वाचा एबीपी माझाच्या सकाळच्या टॉप १० हेडलाईन्स - Morning

    Top 10 ABP Majha Morning Headlines, 6 June 2026 : एबीपी माझा सकाळच्या बुलेटीनमधील टॉप 10 हेडलाईन्स या ठिकाणी वाचायला मिळतील. Read More

  3. \'फक्त माहितीसाठी सांगतो, आजचं आंदोलन तर फक्त एक \'ट्रेलर\' होता\' अमेरिकेतून थेट दिल्लीत धडक देत आंदोलन करताच काॅकरोच संस्थापक अभिजित काय काय म्हणाला?

    Abhijeet Dipke: अभिजीत दीपकेनं शिक्षण मंत्री धर्मेंद्र प्रधान यांच्या राजीनाम्याची मागणी करताना पाच दिवसांचा अल्टीमेटम दिला आहे. Read More

    अमेरिकेने काही देशांवर अतिरिक्त आयात शुल्क लावण्याचा प्रस्ताव दिला आहे. दावा आहे की, हे देश सक्तीच्या मजुरीला प्रतिबंध करण्यासाठी पुरेशी पावले उचलत नाहीत. या प्रस्तावित यादीत भारताचा समावेश आहे. Read More

    Richa Chadha Supports Cockroach Janata Party: कॉकरोच जनता पार्टीच्या आंदोलनाला ऋचा चड्ढानं पाठिंबा दिला आहे. तिनं देशातील तरुणांसाठी खास पोस्ट शेअर केली आहे. Read More

  6. Tejashri Pradhan: \'वीण दोघांतली ही तुटेना\'च्या सेटवरील \'तो\' VIDEO व्हायरल; तेजश्री प्रधानची कमेंट चर्चेत, म्हणाली...

    Veen Doghantli Hi Tutena: \'वीण दोघांतली ही तुटेना\' मालिकेच्या सेटवर तेजश्री प्रधानचा वाढदिवस साजरा. Read More

  7. Shashi Tharoor: \'त्याच्या प्रथम-श्रेणी विक्रमाच्या जवळपासही कोणी नाही तरी सुद्धा...\' सरफराज खानला भारतीय संघातून वगळताच शशी थरुरांचा थेट सवाल

    Shashi Tharoor: एका पोस्टमध्ये त्यांनी बीसीसीआय, मुख्य निवडकर्ता अजित आगरकर आणि प्रशिक्षक गौतम गंभीर यांच्यावर प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित केले आहे. थरूर यांनी पोस्टमध्ये सरफराजला टॅगही केले आहे. Read More

  8. R. Ashwin on Suryakumar Yadav: जो न्याय रोहित, विराटला तोच न्याय सूर्याला का नाही? तुमची माणुसकी मेली का? BCCIवर अश्विन भडकला

    सूर्यकुमार यादवने केवळ कर्णधारपदच गमावले नाही, तर त्याला टी-20 संघातूनही वगळण्यात आले. भारताने त्याच्याच कर्णधारपदाखाली 2026 चा टी-20 विश्वचषक जिंकला होता. Read More

  10. फक्त पाच महिन्यातच 1 लाख कर्मचाऱ्यांना नारळ, नेमकी काय आहेत कारणं? कोणत्या कंपन्यांना बसला मोठा फटका?

    जगातील सर्वात मोठ्या टेक कंपन्या सध्या एका मोठ्या स्थित्यंतरातून जात आहेत. 2026 च्या पहिल्या पाच महिन्यांतच एक लाखांहून अधिक टेक कर्मचाऱ्यांनी आपल्या नोकऱ्या गमावल्या आहेत. Read More

articles.title: Lionel Messi's last dance, Lionel Scaloni's masterplan: Argentina's pursuit of eternal glory
articles.description: As Argentina begin another World Cup campaign, they will once again look to Messi to provide the inspiration and magic that carried them to glory 4 years ago.

articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s fiancée Georgina Rodriguez turns heads with glamorous swimsuit look ahead of 2026 World Cup
articles.description: As Cristiano Ronaldo prepares for a historic sixth FIFA World Cup appearance, public interest around his family remains intense. Georgina Rodriguez recently attracted attention after sharing beach photos with their family, highlighting the global fascination surrounding the couple. At the same time, Portugal continued their World Cup preparations with a 2-1 win over Chile, thanks to goals from Gonçalo Guedes and Bruno Fernandes. The victory reinforced growing optimism around Roberto Martínez’s talented squad as Ronaldo aims to help Portugal pursue the one major trophy missing from his remarkable career.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 warm-ups — Brazil vs Egypt player ratings; report, goals, highlights
articles.description: In a match shaped by early defensive lapses, Brazil struck first through Bruno Guimaraes in the seventh minute after Egypt took too much time on the ball at the back. The Newcastle United midfielder capitalised on the mistake and put Brazil ahead from inside the box.

articles.title: Stephen Curry opens up about emotional conversation with wife Ayesha Curry that changed their relationship forever
articles.description: The NBA legend Stephen Curry has always proven to be a pretty committed husband to his wife, Ayesha Curry, for close to two decades as they have inspired billions of people across the world with their love. While the two have received a lot of hate for their relationship, Stephen Curry has opened up the moment he knew he would marry Ayesha Curry.

articles.title: “I don’t look at it”: Declan Rice breaks silence on dealing with hate as girlfriend Lauren Fryer remains out of spotlight

While both Declan Rice and his girlfriend Lauren Fryer prefer to keep things private, the Arsenal star player recently opened up about how he deals with the hate that he receives.
